 {'date': '2025-05-13 11:30:25',
  'headline': 'EXCLUSIVE: Alzamend Neuro Initiates First Phase 2 Trial Of Lead '
              'Program In Healthy Human Participants',
  'publisher': 'Benzinga',
  'summary': 'Alzamend Neuro, Inc. (NASDAQ:ALZN) on Tuesday announced the '

             'AL001, with the first study in healthy human subjects. This '

             'Dynamic Coils BV, a key component of the clinical trial. In '

             'clinical trial site, Alzamend aims to explore AL001 and its '
             'potential to deliver lithium more effectively in the brain than '

  'url': 'https://finance.yahoo.com/news/exclusive-alzamend-neuro-initiates-first-113025142.html'},
 {'date': '2025-05-07 11:31:26',
  'headline': 'EXCLUSIVE: Alzamend Neuro Partners with QMENTA To Advance '
              'AI-Powered Imaging For Is Phase 2 Trial Of Lead Program',
  'publisher': 'Benzinga',
  'summary': 'Alzamend Neuro, Inc. (NASDAQ:ALZN) on Wednesday announced its '
             'partnership with Mint Labs Inc. d/b/a QMENTA, a medical imaging '
             'artificial intelligence company, to support its five upcoming '
             'Phase 2 trials of AL001 at Massachusetts General Hospital. '
             "QMENTA's cloud-based platform will manage and analyze medical "

             'management. Also Read: EXCLUSIVE: Alzamend Neuro To Start First '

  'url': 'https://finance.yahoo.com/news/exclusive-alzamend-neuro-partners-qmenta-113126556.html'},
